title: Build per-source license register + aggregate-only intake checklist
context: Every source feeding the dataset must be license-cleared and confirmed aggregate/de-identified before extraction, to avoid relicensing copyrighted or controlled-access data. This task builds the per-source license register template and the aggregate-only intake checklist that gate extraction. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Produce a per-source license register template and an aggregate-only intake checklist that together gate whether a source may enter extraction.
acceptanceCriteria: Register template captures access status, license, and permitted use per source.
Aggregate-only intake checklist requires an affirmative 'aggregate, de-identified' classification before a source enters extraction.
COSMIC/OncoKB and any controlled-access source are explicitly marked out of scope.
No source can be marked 'ready for extraction' with an incomplete license row.
